_comment_top: R6 Wave 8 — seed row for the CodeInterpreterHandler 'GenerateChart' method. Replaces one of the two legacy hardcoded LLM functions previously registered on CodeInterpreterTools (removed from SprkChatAgentFactory.ResolveTools lines ~1066-1105).
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'CodeInterpreterHandler'. The handler reads sprk_configuration.method = 'GenerateChart' to dispatch to the matplotlib chart-generation pipeline.
_comment_method_dispatch: Two rows (CODE-ANALYZE / CODE-CHART) share one handler class — same pattern as KnowledgeRetrievalHandler (Wave 7c) and TextRefinementHandler (Wave 7 Q9). Each row's sprk_configuration.method discriminator selects the internal method.
_comment_security: sprk_requiredcapability = 'code_interpreter' (= PlaybookCapabilities.CodeInterpreter) gates this tool to playbooks whose capability set includes 'code_interpreter'. Standalone chat (no playbook, capabilities = CoreCapabilities) does NOT include 'code_interpreter', so this handler is unreachable from standalone chat — preserving the pre-Wave-8 security boundary.
_comment_widget: This method emits an output_pane ChartViewer widget via ToolResult.Metadata.widget (R6 Wave 7b adapter post-processing). The widget envelope carries the chart-type + base-64 PNG image + output length so frontends can render the chart in the output pane. The chat-visible text ALSO embeds the chart inline as a markdown image data URI — preserves the pre-Wave-8 user-visible rendering AND adds the structured widget for richer pane rendering.
_comment_attribution: Spec MUST rule: AI-generated charts MUST be labelled '[AI-generated chart]'. The handler's FormatChartResult prefixes every chart with this label so users are aware the image was produced by an AI model.
_comment_adr018: ADR-018 kill switch (CodeInterpreterOptions.Enabled) is enforced inside the handler before every sandbox call. When disabled, the handler returns a successful ToolResult with a user-readable unavailability string in data.message.
_comment_adr016: ADR-016 rate limiting via static SemaphoreSlim bounded by CodeInterpreterOptions.MaxConcurrency is enforced inside the handler.
_comment_adr015: ADR-015 data governance: only caller-supplied 'dataSeries' is forwarded to the sandbox. The handler does NOT auto-fetch external resources. Telemetry logs lengths + chart type + hasChart flag only — never the data series content.
_comment_description_loadbearing: sprk_description is LOAD-BEARING per NFR-12: the LLM uses the description text to decide WHEN to invoke this tool. The exact phrasing below is preserved verbatim from the legacy hardcoded registration so the LLM's tool-selection behavior is unchanged after migration.
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_handlerclass + sprk_toolcode + sprk_name 'SYS-%' filter; UPSERTs.
sprk_description: Generate a chart image (bar, line, or pie) from a JSON data series. Use this when the user wants a visual chart from structured data. dataSeries must be a JSON array of objects with 'label' and 'value' fields.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000001 = Chat only. The legacy CodeInterpreterTools was registered exclusively for chat; the 11 production node executors (NFR-08) do not include a Code Interpreter executor.

sprk_jsonschema.title: CodeInterpreterHandler.GenerateChart Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of the GenerateChart method. The 'dataSeries' is a JSON-array string of {label, value} objects; 'chartType' selects bar, line, or pie. Both fields are required.

dataSeries.description: Data series as a JSON array string (e.g., '[{"label":"Q1","value":120},{"label":"Q2","value":135}]'). Each item should be an object with 'label' and 'value' fields. MUST NOT include PII or data beyond what is needed for the chart (ADR-015 data governance).

chartType.description: Chart type: bar, line, or pie. Unsupported values fall back to 'bar' (handler-side forgiveness).

sprk_configuration._comment: method = 'GenerateChart' is the dispatch discriminator. This row exposes only the chart-generation method.
